results.name: Data Volume - 1000 inventory items
results.detail: Inventory count after seeding: 1000

results.name: Duplicate Part Number Guard
results.detail: Duplicate part numbers are rejected at the API level.

results.name: Negative Inventory Validation
results.detail: Negative stock response status: 200

results.name: Zero and Low Stock Records
results.detail: Zero and low-stock parts created without crashing.

results.name: Data Volume - 200 jobs
results.detail: Job count after seeding: 200

results.name: Edge Case Job - No Parts
results.detail: API currently blocks jobs with no parts, which is consistent but means this workflow is unsupported.

results.name: Edge Case Job - One Part
results.detail: Created a single-part job successfully.

results.name: Long List - Job With 100 Parts
results.detail: Created a very large job to exercise list rendering and expansion pressure.

results.name: Data Volume - 300 purchase orders
results.detail: Purchase order count after seeding: 300

results.name: Long List - Purchase Order With 20+ Line Items
results.detail: Current data model only supports one part per purchase order, so true multi-line PO stress is not yet supported.

results.name: Data Volume - Bootstrap Load Time
results.detail: Average /api/bootstrap under heavy data: 25.00 ms, max 31.95 ms

results.name: Data Integrity - Same Part Across Multiple Jobs
results.detail: Shared part stock changed from 25 to 20 after pulls across two jobs.

results.name: Over Receiving - Inventory Uses Actual Received Quantity
results.detail: Received quantity stored as 15 on PO PO-1012.

results.name: Partial Receiving - Running Totals
results.detail: Received quantity 65 across 3 receiving entries.

results.name: Job Editing - Persisted Fields
results.detail: Job details, notes, and long/special-character note persisted correctly.

results.name: Rapid Action - Pull/Return Stability
results.detail: After rapid pull/return cycles, pulled quantity settled at 0.

results.name: Navigation/Persistence - Repeated Reloads
results.detail: 30 repeated bootstrap calls completed. Max response time 33.99 ms.

results.name: Persistence - Data Survives Refresh
results.detail: Edited data remained intact after fresh bootstrap reload.

results.name: Long List UI - Layout / Scroll / Dropdown Rendering
results.detail: Heavy data for long-list UI was created (100-part jobs, 1000 parts, 300 POs), but actual scrolling, overlap, and dropdown rendering need browser-side verification.

results.name: Search / Filter Accuracy in Browser
results.detail: Similar part names and duplicate-like job names were seeded, but visual search result clarity and rapid filter interaction need browser-side verification.

results.name: Navigation Stress - Tab Switching / State Persistence in Browser
results.detail: Repeated bootstrap reloads passed, but actual rapid tab switching and dropdown persistence need browser-side verification.

results.name: Full System UI Stress - Smooth Scrolling / Freeze Check
results.detail: The backend and payload stress run completed under heavy data. Browser responsiveness still needs manual validation on the live UI.
